testimonial1.author: Sarah Al-Rashid

testimonial2.text: Finally, a platform that understands MENA creators. No hidden fees, just simple payouts.
testimonial2.author: Ahmed Hassan

testimonial3.text: My students love the clean checkout experience. Conversion rates went up 40% after switching.
testimonial3.author: Nour Khalil

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.ctaSubtitle: Join creators who are already monetizing their expertise with Afeed.
faq.ctaFootnote: Free to start • No credit card required
faq.a1: Afeed is a platform that helps creators sell digital products and services. Think of it as your personal online store - beautiful, simple, and built for MENA.
faq.a2: Courses, live sessions, e-books, templates, and any digital product. If you can deliver it online, you can sell it on Afeed.
faq.a3: You choose your payout schedule - weekly, monthly, or immediate. Funds are transferred directly to your bank account with full transparency.
faq.a4: No revenue share. You keep 100% of your earnings minus standard payment processing fees (typically 2-3%).
faq.a5: No. Afeed gives you a professional storefront page. Just share your link and start selling.
faq.q6: Can I sell in Arabic and English?
faq.a6: Yes! Afeed fully supports both languages with proper RTL layout for Arabic content.
faq.a7: Our support team is here for you. Reach out anytime through the platform or email.
faq.a8: Yes, you can start for free and only pay processing fees when you make sales.

builtFor.title: Built for people who turn expertise into income

cards.title: Coaches & Consultants
cards.description: No more WhatsApp bookings, payment links, and follow-up reminders. Run your entire practice professionally - live sessions, courses, analytics, and payments - from one place built for this market.

cards.title: Experts
cards.description: You're already the expert. Afeed gives you a professional storefront to sell your knowledge online - without needing a tech team or a foreign payment setup.

cards.title: Professional Creators
cards.description: You've built an audience that listens. Stop depending on brand deals and algorithms - and start earning directly from the people who already trust you.
